title: Aurora, 99132, Palm Pals Reindeer, 5In, Soft Toy, Brown
features: From Aurora's highly popular Palm Pals Collection
Soft and extremely touchable soft toy made with high quality materials
Adorable Reindeer cuddly toy that is filled with beans
Children will love this cute and hugely collectable character
description: From the manufacturer AURORA, Palm Pals Reindeer, 5In, Soft Toy, Brown Palm Pals Reindeer Soft Toy fits perfectly into the palm of your hand, he is full of beans which makes him super soft and cuddly. His body is a soft brown plush material. Palm Pals Reindeer Soft Toy is a gorgeous golden brown reindeer measuring 13 cm. Palm Pals make great gifts for any occasion, whether it is for a birthday or as a general gift, everyone will fall in love with this adorable Reindeer.
